'''''Charm's Way''''' was a large [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] captained by [[Reeve Dallows]] prior to his disappearance.

''Charm's Way'' and its convoy once came under attack from a number of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], flying [[Dianoga-class assault starfighter|Dianoga]], [[Dagger-class starfighter|Dagger]] and [[MorningStar]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. The attack was repelled by [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Flight]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Charm's Way'' appears in a bonus mission in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']].
